base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_clyde_move — a character from 1980 pac man. Orange ghost (Clyde / Pokey / Otoboko-Guzuta) — 2-frame body-wave cycle, orange palette. AI: chases directly when far, scatters to corner when within 8 tiles (feigned). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Orange ghost (Clyde / Pokey / Otoboko-Guzuta) — 2-frame body-wave cycle, orange palette. AI: chases directly when far, scatters to corner when within 8 tiles (feigned)
